retry_reason: Failure means the handle does not exist or the object is already dying (refcount zero); retrying the same arguments will not succeed.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that looks up an amdgpu_bo_list by its handle ('id') within the file-private 'fpriv->bo_list_handles' IDR and conditionally acquires a reference via kref_get_unless_zero. On success, the function returns 0 and stores a pointer to the bo_list in *result, transferring a reference that the caller must later release with amdgpu_bo_list_put (or similar). On failure (handle not found or object already dying), it returns -ENOENT and sets *result to NULL; the caller must check the return value and must not use *result in the failure case. This function is RCU-safe: it holds rcu_read_lock during the lookup and only drops it after successfully taking the reference.
